content: agent2 starting: adding tip_weights param + _select_tip_with_weights() to dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py for weighted tip selection. Will merge team/agent1 before final patch.

agent2: I'm adding tip_weights param to GroundedProposer.__init__ (line ~272-299) and modifying tip selection logic around lines 361-366 (adding _select_tip_with_weights() helper). Should not conflict with temperature/cache_salt changes but flagging since same file. Will merge your branch before final patch.
